PowerShell($chrome = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($chrome\) { Start-Process $chrome -ArgumentList '--remote-debugging-port=9222','--user-data-dir=C:\\Users\\dindi\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\chrome-debug','http://localhost:8731/index.html'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "launched: $chrome" } else { "Chrome not found" })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('editor.html','utf8'\);const m=[...h.matchAll\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)].map\(x=>x[1]\).join\('\\n;\\n'\);const vm=require\('vm'\);try{new vm.Script\(m\);console.log\('editor inline JS: OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('editor JS ERROR:',e.message\)}")
